# BREATHE Complete Edition Manifest

**Product:** BREATHE — Respiratory Care Complete AI OS<br>
**Complete program ID:** `RCAIOS-BREATHE-COMPLETE-1.0`<br>
**Foundation ID:** `RCAIOS-LIFE-PRACTICE-1.0`<br>
**Overlay ID:** `RCAIOS-BREATHE-1.0`<br>
**Population lane:** `respiratory_care`<br>
**Route:** `/respiratory-care`<br>
**Namespace:** `resp_breathe.*`<br>
**Home:** `My BREATHE`<br>
**Version:** `1.0`<br>
**Starting context:** Private Respiratory OS • no PHI • no live care • no device data or control • conversation/model memory session-only • artifact persistence approval-required • connectors Off • actions Off • 10 agents PERM-P0 Disabled • Preview-first

## Release inventory

- One respiratory-care lane, route, namespace and My BREATHE home
- SCOPE, CIRCLE and ORBIT governance
- 18 professional-owned record schemas
- 24 powers, all Available Inactive
- 24 workflows and 30 templates
- 10 suggested agents, all PERM-P0 Disabled
- 72 foundation, 72 overlay and 16 integration checks: 160 total
- S0, S1 and S2 checkpoints and exact resume
- Privacy, source, human-approval, Pause All, Safe Reset, kill, correction, export, deletion, rollback, purge, power removal, overlay removal and full uninstall

## Non-dependency

This program does not depend on, modify or share state with any nursing, resident, physician, educator or generic workforce OS. Use a separate Respiratory Care workspace when isolation cannot be proven. Official NBRC records verify credential status but do not grant local authority. Current law, licensing-board rules, license or permit, employer privileging and policy, medical direction, orders, protocols, manufacturer instructions and authorized humans determine local authority.
